description_long: This is a compact drum kit featuring a blue and black color scheme, consisting of a bass drum, snare drum, tom-tom, hi-hat, crash cymbal, and a padded round drum stool. The bass drum is centrally positioned with a white drumhead displaying a stylized signature, flanked by a snare and tom-tom, both mounted on metal stands. The hi-hat and crash cymbal are supported by adjustable chrome stands, each with a wide, stable tripod base. The drum shells are finished in a glossy blue with black rims, while the cymbals are metallic and slightly reflective. The drum stool is round, black, and cushioned, supported by a sturdy tripod stand. This set is suitable for street performances, garage bands, or urban music events.
description: A blue and black drum kit with chrome stands, metallic cymbals, and a padded stool, ideal for urban music settings. The set includes a bass drum, snare, tom-tom, hi-hat, and crash cymbal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full drum kit layout, with the bass drum and its white head, snare, tom-tom, cymbals, and stool all clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left rear angle highlighting the blue drum shells, the side of the bass drum, and the arrangement of the tom-tom and snare.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the backs of the drums and cymbals, with the stool in the foreground and the blue finish prominent.
description_view_3: Right rear angle showing the tom-tom and snare from behind, the side of the bass drum, and the stool positioned to the left.
attribute_label_or_signage: painted marking (signature/brand name on bass drum)
attribute_placement_location: indoor, residential, garage, or street performance
